title: Échec au porteur
writer: Noël Calef, Pierre Véry, Gilles Grangier
actors: Paul Meurisse, Jeanne Moreau, Serge Reggiani
plot: After resolving to start a new life with his girlfriend Jacqueline, Bastien Sassey decides to give up working as a courier for drugs traffickers. So that he and Jacqueline can make a fresh start he agrees to take on one more job f...
